zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Hankford於1431年1月出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Richard Hankford33歲，母親Anne Montague48歲。她於大約1445年7月11日與Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年11月13日享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦瓦波三。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Hankford于1431年1月出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Richard Hankford33岁，母亲Anne Montague48岁。她于大约1445年7月11日与Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年11月13日享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦瓦波三。

nameMeanings.name: Hankford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Hackforth (North Yorkshire) or Hackford (Norfolk). The former is named with Old English haca ‘hook’ + ford ‘ford’, meaning ‘ford at the bend’. The latter likely has the same etymology, or may contain the Old English personal name Haca.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Hankford was born in January 1431, in England, her father, Sir Richard Hankford, was 33 and her mother, Anne Montague, was 48. She married Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond about 11 July 1445, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 November 1485, at the age of 54, and was buried in Wapping, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Hankford est née en janvier 1431, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Hankford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Montague, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond environ 11 juillet 1445, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1485, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Wapping, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Hankford im Januar 1431 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Hankford 33 und ihre Mutter Anne Montague 48. Sie hat um 11. Juli 1445 in England Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. November 1485 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Wapping, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Hankford è nata il nel gennaio 1431 nel England, sua padre, Sir Richard Hankford, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Anne Montague, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond circa 11 luglio 1445, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1485, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Wapping, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Hankfordが1431年1月にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Hankfordは33歳，母Anne Montagueは48歳であった。約1445年7月11日にイギリスでThomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年11月13日に54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンワップイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Hankford(이)가 1431년 1월 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Hankford(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Montague(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 7월 11일 영국에서 Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 11월 13일 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 왑핀그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Hankford nasceu em janeiro de 1431, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Hankford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Montague, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond aproximadamente 11 de julho de 1445, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1485, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Wapping, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Hankford родилась январь 1431 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Hankford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Montague, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond около 11 июля 1445 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 ноября 1485 г. в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ваппинг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Hankford nació en enero de 1431, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Hankford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne Montague, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Thomas Butler 7th Earl of Ormond aproximadamente 11 de julio de 1445, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1485, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Wapping, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
